rationale: Exp 488 shows max_depth=8 achieves Brier=0.185830 (Δ=-0.000182), which is better than current best of 0.186013. While slightly worse than max_depth=7 (0.185762), it suggests the optimal depth may be between 7-8. Testing max_depth=8 as the new baseline could unlock further improvements when combined with other parameter adjustments in subsequent iterations.
